data.title: Analyst Says It’s Time To Rethink Altcoins And Alt Season Expectations – Here’s Why
data.description:
As the market bleeds red and most altcoins lose crucial levels, some have suggested that investors must reshape their expectations of the crypto market this cycle and the long-awaited “alt season. ” Related Reading: BitMine’s Unrealized Losses Hit $3. 7B As Ethereum (ETH) Price Struggles Below $3,000 Old Crypto Cycle Is Gone – Analyst Over the past month, the crypto market has wiped out over $1 trillion in market capitalization due to a series of large-scale liquidations and strong selling pressure since the October 10 pullback, which has sunk investors’ sentiment to its lowest levels in months. Amid this performance, the early Q4 rally buzz has faded, and most altcoins have lost the ground gained during the Q3 market breakout
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/analyst-says-its-time-to-rethink-altcoins-and-alt-season-expectations-heres-why/

data.title: Deutsche Bank Holds Significant Stake in MicroStrategy
data.description: According to Odaily, Deutsche Bank, with assets totaling $1.6 trillion, holds shares in MicroStrategy (MSTR) valued at $115 million.

data.title: Galaxy Digital withdrew 7,098 ETH from Binance, bringing its total withdrawals over the past month to over 14,000 ETH.
data.description: According to @OnchainDataNerd, Galaxy Digital withdrew 7,098 ETH (approximately $19.42 million) from Binance 11 hours ago. In the past month, he has withdrawn a total of 14,096 ETH (approximately $44.12 million), with an average entry price of approximately $3,130.

data.title: mF International Plans $500 Million Private Placement to Acquire Bitcoin Cash
data.description:
According to Odaily, Nasdaq-listed company mF International has announced a private placement of 50 million Class A common shares and prepaid warrants to qualified institutional investors at a price of $10. 00 per share. This initiative aims to raise $500 million, with the transaction expected to conclude on December 1, 2025. The funds will be utilized to purchase Bitcoin Cash and establish a related digital asset treasury
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/32715992376258?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki Sells Bitcoin Holdings for Investment in Medical Centers
data.description:
According to Odaily, Robert Kiyosaki, author of 'Rich Dad Poor Dad,' announced on the X platform that he sold $2. 25 million worth of Bitcoin at approximately $90,000 each. These Bitcoins were originally purchased several years ago at an average price of $6,000. Kiyosaki stated that he plans to use the proceeds from the Bitcoin sale to acquire two surgical centers and invest in a billboard company
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/32707696121281?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Institutional Confidence in SharpLink Stocks Grows Despite Market Challenges
data.description: According to Odaily, Joseph Lubin, co-founder of Ethereum and founder of Consensys, as well as chairman of SharpLink, expressed agreement with SharpLink CIO Matt Sheffield's remarks on the X platform. Sheffield noted that the '13F filings, which disclose holdings of large asset management institutions, are typically submitted within 45 days after the end of each quarter, leading to a lag in market data adoption.' Lubin highlighted a clear trend in recent filings, indicating a continuous increase in institutional holdings of SharpLink stocks. Despite the current macroeconomic environment affecting both stock and crypto markets, the data reflects growing institutional confidence. Lubin pointed out that the delayed disclosures can easily obscure this trend, adding that tokenized stocks will eventually offer clearer real-time transparency.

data.title: mF International Plans $500 Million Private Placement to Acquire Bitcoin Cash
data.description: According to Odaily, Nasdaq-listed company mF International has announced a private placement of 50 million Class A common shares and prepaid warrants to qualified institutional investors at a price of $10.00 per share. This initiative aims to raise $500 million, with the transaction expected to conclude on December 1, 2025. The funds will be utilized to purchase Bitcoin Cash and establish a related digital asset treasury.

data.title: Robert Kiyosaki Sells Bitcoin Holdings for Investment in Medical Centers
data.description:
According to Odaily, Robert Kiyosaki, author of 'Rich Dad Poor Dad,' announced on the X platform that he sold $2.25 million worth of Bitcoin at approximately $90,000 each. These Bitcoins were originally purchased several years ago at an average price of $6,000.

Kiyosaki stated that he plans to use the proceeds from the Bitcoin sale to acquire two surgical centers and invest in a billboard company. He emphasized his continued bullish outlook on Bitcoin, expressing optimism about gaining more returns as his positive cash flow increases.

However, his actions have sparked criticism, with many commenters pointing out the contradiction between his previous advocacy for buying and holding Bitcoin and his recent decision to sell.

data.title: Market news: Deutsche Bank, with assets of $1.6 trillion, holds $115 million worth of Strategy shares.
data.description: According to BitcoinTreasuries.NET, Deutsche Bank (with assets of $1.6 trillion) holds a $115 million stake in Strategy (MSTR).

data.title: Kiyosaki Dumps $2.25M in Bitcoin During Market Crash—Here’s Why
data.description:
Robert Kiyosaki sold his $2. 25 million Bitcoin position to reinvest in cash-flowing businesses but remains bullish on BTC long-term as markets enter extreme fear.

The post Kiyosaki Dumps $2. 25M in Bitcoin During Market Crash—Here’s Why first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Coinbase Derivatives to Launch 24/7 Futures Trading for Major Altcoins on December 5
data.description:
Coinbase Derivatives, the CFTC-regulated futures arm of Coinbase, will roll out a new suite of altcoin futures beginning December 5, 2025, marking one of the largest expansions of regulated crypto derivatives in the United States.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/coinbase-derivatives-to-launch-24-7-futures-trading-for-major-altcoins-on-december-5/

data.title: BitMine Bets on U.S. Staking Network Despite $3.7B ETH Losses
data.description:
BitMine is launching its “Made in America Validator Network” in 2026 to stake its Ethereum holdings despite facing more than $3. 7 billion in unrealized losses.

The post BitMine Bets on U. S. Staking Network Despite $3. 7B ETH Losses first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/11/22/bitmine-bets-on-us-staking-3-5-b-loss/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bitmine-bets-on-us-staking-3-5-b-loss

data.title: He Yi retweeted CZ's 2020 tweet that "BTC will plummet from $101,000 to $85,000" and remarked: Time flies.
data.description: Binance co-founder He Yi retweeted CZ's five-year-old tweet on the X platform, predicting that "BTC will drop from $101,000 to $85,000," with the caption "Time flies." The tweet, posted on October 17, 2020, reads: "Waiting for the next headline: BTC will plummet from $101,000 to $85,000. Save this tweet."

data.title: Japan’s Harsh Crypto Tax Rules Are Fueling a Boom in Bitcoin Treasury Firms
data.description:
Japan’s unusual tax landscape is creating an environment where Bitcoin-holding corporations routinely outperform Bitcoin itself, drawing investors toward “digital-asset treasury” (DAT) firms even as regulators consider tightening oversight.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/japans-harsh-crypto-tax-rules-are-fueling-a-boom-in-bitcoin-treasury-firms/
